narrative:
Coshocton County has 21,554 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.2% of registrants.
